hero.title: The Waterloo Inn
hero.description: A traditional Peak District pub with a rustic campsite, large beer garden and stunning panoramic countryside views.

about.title: A Traditional Derbyshire Pub with a View
paragraphs: Located in the heart of Biggin, our elevated setting offers panoramic views across rolling farmland and open landscapes — making us one of the most scenic pub locations in the Peak District.

Whether you're visiting after a countryside walk or planning a relaxed weekend away, The Waterloo Inn delivers authentic village hospitality in an unforgettable setting. Step inside to find cosy fires, well-kept real ales, and hearty home-cooked food prepared with care.
We've been welcoming walkers, cyclists, families and their four-legged friends for years. Come for the views, stay for the atmosphere.
about.imageAlt: Heritage corner at The Waterloo Inn featuring a framed sketch of the pub, horse brasses and historical photos

beerGarden.title: One of the Best Beer Gardens in the Peak District
paragraphs: Our spacious beer garden overlooks stunning Derbyshire scenery, offering what many visitors describe as one of the best views in England. It's the perfect spot to unwind with a pint after a day on the hills.
Few pubs combine space, scenery and atmosphere quite like The Waterloo Inn.

food.title: Hearty Food & Fine Ales
food.description: Our kitchen serves up honest, home-cooked pub food — the kind of hearty dishes you crave after a day in the Derbyshire countryside. Alongside well-kept real ales, quality wines and a warm welcome.

previewItems.name: Napoleon's Retreat
previewItems.description: Cottage pie, beef slowly cooked in gravy topped with buttery mash

previewItems.name: The Waterloo Toastie
previewItems.description: Ham, mature cheddar & wholegrain mustard mayo on a bloomer

previewItems.name: Beef & Blue Ciabatta
previewItems.description: Derbyshire beef with rich gravy, Peak Blue & onion jam

campsiteTeaser.title: Peak District Camping with a View
campsiteTeaser.description: Our rustic campsite offers peaceful countryside camping in Biggin, just steps from the pub. Enjoy a day exploring the hills, then return for great food, real ale and an unforgettable sunset.
features: Peak District routes on your doorstep
